rows.title: Shanghai Home Dining by Local Shanghainese Family (of 3 and a dog!)
rows.bio: Hi! I’m a Shanghai local and I love home cooking.

messages: I'm passionate about simple, comforting home-style Chinese cooking - the kind meant to be shared with family and friends around the table.
Here's my sample menu. As a proud Shanghainese, I'm all about making local Shanghainese dishes. We can always adjust based on your dietary requirements and preferences! (Can accommodate vegetarian)
I cook for my family every day and often host relatives during holidays. My cooking is typical Chinese home-style food-simple, comforting and meant to be shared.
This would be my first time hosting international guests, but I’d love to open my home and share a real family- style Chinese meal and everyday stories about life in Shanghai.
We live in a beautiful apartment in Pudong, not too far away from Huangpu River. We are a family of three - my husband, my daughter, and our friendly dog.
stdout:
menuDescription	title	bio
I'm passionate about simple, comforting home-style Chinese cooking - the kind meant to be shared with family and friends around the table.

Here's my sample menu. As a proud Shanghainese, I'm all about making local Shanghainese dishes. We can always adjust based on your dietary requirements and preferences! (Can accommodate vegetarian)

- Sweet and sour pork ribs
- Roasted Gluten
- Steamed Yellow Croaker 
- Mapo tofu
- Cucumber Salad	Shanghai Home Dining by Local Shanghainese Family (of 3 and a dog!)	Hi! I’m a Shanghai local and I love home cooking.

I cook for my family every day and often host relatives during holidays. My cooking is typical Chinese home-style food-simple, comforting and meant to be shared.

This would be my first time hosting international guests, but I’d love to open my home and share a real family- style Chinese meal and everyday stories about life in Shanghai.

We live in a beautiful apartment in Pudong, not too far away from Huangpu River. We are a family of three - my husband, my daughter, and our friendly dog.
